evals.prompt: Write a k6 load test script that simulates 50 concurrent users logging in and fetching their profile over 5 minutes. The API is at https://api.example.com.
evals.expected_output: k6 JavaScript load test script with VUs, duration, and HTTP requests.
expectations: Includes options object with 50 VUs and 5m duration
Simulates a login request followed by a profile fetch
Includes basic checks (status 200) and sleep times
Includes thresholds for latency or error rate

evals.prompt: Generate a Locust Python script to test our search endpoint. Users should arrive gradually (ramp-up) to 100 users, and pick a random search query from a list.
evals.expected_output: Python Locust test script with HttpUser and ramp-up configuration.
expectations: Defines an HttpUser class with wait_time
Includes a task for the search endpoint using random.choice()
Provides instructions on how to run Locust with ramp-up parameters
